blended.narrative: Marmot Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 2,425 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
